1
This section makes people think and start from scratch.

We need to give options like Cloud gives options to us. Users will either choose from this random AI-generated options or they can take a hint and write from their own idea, or they can add all the options and write something new or ask for more options.

http://109.205.182.135:3003/
2
This box is too small for a webinar and the animations are not lucrative.

This box is so small that it is not even visible in the webinar. It needs to be big and beautiful animations. So it should look like agents working in the background to write the book, put the book together so we can position the application as a book writing agent, a storyteller agent.

http://109.205.182.135:3003/
3
Click "GEMINI The Boy Who Wanted A Magic Wand ..."
http://109.205.182.135:3003/
4
PDF doesn't generate.

We want PDF to generate and image aspect ratio must be intact. It should not be distorted.

http://109.205.182.135:3003/
5
Click "📕KDP Amazon ready" doesn't work

This KDP, Amazon Ready, should be active.

http://109.205.182.135:3003/
6
Click "📱Flipbook Shareable link" doesn't work.

Flipbook is one of the most lucrative things ever. Because with Flipbook links, people can read the book without downloading the PDF, even share the books, etc. It's very important to start working.

http://109.205.182.135:3003/
